summary: Guided Tour feature testing completed. All 15 test cases passed. Tour auto-starts after ~800ms in Demo Mode for new users. Tour does NOT appear for admin users or in Live Mode. All 8 tour steps work correctly with proper navigation (Next/Back). Skip tour and Close (X) button properly close tour and set localStorage. CTA step navigates to /pricing. Restart Tour button visible in More dropdown (desktop) and mobile menu for demo mode users only. Step progress dots update correctly. Click shield blocks interaction with underlying UI.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data and localStorage manipulation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guided Tour feature is fully functional. Tour auto-starts in Demo Mode for new users (localStorage 'alphaTourSeen' not set). Tour has 8 steps: welcome, dashboard, signals, research, lab, agents, mode, cta. Tour uses spotlight highlighting on nav items. Admin users never see tour (useSystemMode overrides demo for admins). Restart Tour button in More dropdown (desktop) and mobile menu dispatches 'alphaai-restart-tour' event. CTA step navigates to /pricing. All data-testids work correctly: guided-tour-overlay, tour-step-{id}, tour-next-btn, tour-back-btn, tour-close-btn, tour-skip-btn, restart-tour-desktop, restart-tour-mobile.

tour_auto_start: Tour auto-starts after ~800ms in Demo Mode for new users - PASS
Tour does NOT appear when localStorage 'alphaTourSeen' is set - PASS
tour_visibility_rules: Tour does NOT appear for admin users - PASS
Tour does NOT appear in Live Mode (no demo param) - PASS
Restart Tour button NOT visible for admin users - PASS

Welcome step shows 'Welcome to My-AlphaAI' title - PASS
Welcome step has 'Start Tour' button - PASS
Welcome step has 'Skip tour' button - PASS
Welcome step has Close (X) button - PASS
tour_navigation: Clicking 'Start Tour' advances to Dashboard step - PASS
Clicking 'Next' advances through all 8 steps - PASS
Clicking 'Back' goes to previous step - PASS
Step order: welcome → dashboard → signals → research → lab → agents → mode → cta - PASS
tour_close_functionality: Clicking X button closes tour - PASS
Tour does NOT re-appear after being skipped (persistence) - PASS
cta_step: CTA step shows 'Ready to Go Live?' title - PASS
CTA step has golden 'Upgrade to Pro' button - PASS
Clicking 'Upgrade to Pro' navigates to /pricing - PASS
Tour closes after CTA click - PASS
restart_tour: Restart Tour button visible in More dropdown (desktop, demo mode) - PASS
Restart Tour button visible in mobile menu (demo mode) - PASS
Restart Tour clears localStorage and re-opens tour from step 1 - PASS
ui_elements: Tour overlay blocks interaction with underlying UI (click shield) - PASS
Step progress dots visible and update correctly - PASS
Spotlight highlighting works on nav items - PASS
